description_for_model: 16 pay-per-call utility APIs for AI agents using the x402 protocol. Services: ScrapePay (web scraping via Playwright), MarkdownOpt (URL/HTML to clean markdown), StructExtract (HTML to structured JSON), CacheServe (URL fetch with caching), LinkRisk (URL risk profile), LinkSafe (URL safety via Playwright+VirusTotal), PromptGuard (prompt injection scoring), SchemaGate (JSON Schema validation), DocConvert-Text (format conversion), DocConvert-PDF (HTML/markdown to PDF), NotifyRelay email/telegram/webhook (notifications), Web Synthesise (multi-source research), Screenshot (Playwright PNG), PDF Render (high-fidelity URL to PDF). All charged in USDC on Base via x402 protocol. No account required.
description_for_human: 16 pay-per-call x402 utility APIs for AI agents. Scrape, validate, notify, convert, synthesise. No accounts, no API keys. Pay in USDC on Base.
